title: Warsh will cut rates, despite consensus view of rate hikes: Analyst
summary: The current Federal Funds target rate is between 350 and 375 basis points, which traders project to rise by at least 25 basis points in December 2026.

title: Binance denies new WSJ report alleging $850M in Iran-linked transactions
summary: Binance CEO Richard Teng denied a new WSJ report alleging $850 million in Iran-linked transactions flowed through the exchange to the IRGC.

title: Hungary’s New Premier Warns Predecessor Left Budget ‘Skeletons’
summary: Hungary’s new Prime Minister Peter Magyar said he was hoping for economic growth of about 2% this year but put voters on notice that the state of public finances left by his predecessor made it impossible to make firm forecasts.

title: Uber Proposes Delivery Hero Takeover in €33-Per-Share Offer
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. proposed a takeover offer to buy Delivery Hero SE stock it doesn’t already own for €33 ($38) per share as it seeks to better compete with DoorDash Inc. outside the US.

title: The History and Future of Physical Bitcoin
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

The History and Future of Physical Bitcoin
Bitcoin is invisible code — but for over a decade, creators have turned it into coins, cards, and USBs you can touch. Here’s how close we’ve gotten to real, cash-like BTC.

title: Firefox's Big Redesign Gives You a Button to Kill All the AI
summary: Project Nova is coming later this year with a cleaner look, compact mode, and a toggle to make AI features disappear entirely.

title: Bitcoin Dives Below $75K for First Time in a Month as Crypto Liquidations Near $1 Billion
summary: Bitcoin touched its lowest price in a month overnight following an awful week for ETFs, which shed over $1.25 billion this week.

title: FTX’s former law firm, auditor agree to pay $66 million to settle customer claims over fraud
summary: The law firm, Fenwick & West, denied wrongdoing and still faces a separate $525 million suit in Washington that is not covered by Friday's deal.

title: Spot bitcoin ETFs shed $1.26 billion in worst week since late January as ether funds see 10-day outflow streak
summary: BlackRock's IBIT now holds $61.1 billion in net assets against $64.8 billion in cumulative inflows, a difference of roughly $3.7 billion.

title: US and Iran move closer to extending ceasefire by 60 days, say mediators
summary: Terms of the deal include the gradual reopening of the Strait of Hormuz

title: US oil producers increase output to capture price surge from Iran war
summary: Drilling expansion follows 40 per cent jump in cost from global supply crunch that has dented president’s approval ratings
